summary: Tested and VERIFIED the purchase invoice -> inventory/stock fix. All 14 backend tests PASSED. The fix correctly creates new items, variants, and inventory records when creating purchase invoices with NEW items. Stock quantities are correctly set and incremented.
critical_code_review_comments: FIX VERIFIED: Lines 9791-9827 in server.py correctly create new items with current_stock set to purchased quantity
FIX VERIFIED: Lines 9852-9868 correctly create inventory records with proper quantity
FIX VERIFIED: Lines 9889-9907 correctly aggregate and update stock counts for both variants and items
FIX VERIFIED: Proper logging added for debugging (logger.info for item/variant/inventory creation)
seed_data_creation: Created test items TEST_New_Product_* via purchase invoice API during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchase invoice -> inventory flow is working correctly. Test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_purchase_invoice_inventory.py can be reused for regression testing.

features_tested.create_purchase_invoice_with_new_item: PASSED - New items are created with correct initial stock
features_tested.verify_item_in_items_list: PASSED - New item appears in Items list with stock=50
features_tested.verify_inventory_record: PASSED - Inventory record created with quantity=50
features_tested.verify_stock_increment: PASSED - Second purchase correctly increased stock from 50 to 75
features_tested.verify_stock_transfer_access: PASSED - Stock transfers endpoint accessible, items available for transfer

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Items created via purchase invoice not showing in Items list
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Lines 9791-9810: New items created with current_stock = quantity (not 0)

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Inventory records not showing purchased quantity
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Lines 9852-9868: Inventory records created with proper quantity and current_stock fields

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Variant stock showing 0 instead of purchased quantity
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Lines 9889-9897: Variant current_stock updated via aggregation from inventory records

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Item total stock not aggregated properly
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: Lines 9899-9907: Item current_stock updated via aggregation from all inventory records

ui_verification.items_page: PASSED - Items visible including Test Jacket 123 (25 pcs) and test items
ui_verification.inventory_page: PASSED - Shows inventory records with correct quantities (test item shows 75 units as expected from 50+25)
ui_verification.stock_transfers_page: PASSED - Accessible with New Transfer button
ui_verification.purchases_link: VISIBLE - Purchases menu accessible in sidebar

rca_of_the_issue: The original bug occurred because when creating purchase invoices with NEW items that don't exist in the database, the code was not properly setting the initial current_stock values. The fix ensures: 1) New items are created with current_stock = purchased quantity, 2) New variants are created with current_stock = purchased quantity, 3) Inventory records are created with correct quantity, 4) After inventory updates, both item and variant current_stock values are aggregated from all inventory records across stores.
